functions.name: sawsi.shared.aws_es_proxy_util.install_aws_es_proxy
documentation:
Detect the operating system and install aws-es-proxy along with its dependencies.
This function will install Homebrew (if needed), Go, and aws-es-proxy based on the OS.
It also sets up the required environment variables.

functions.name: sawsi.shared.aws_es_proxy_util.install_brew
documentation:
Check if Homebrew is installed on macOS. If not, install Homebrew.
Homebrew is a package manager for macOS that makes it easy to install software.

functions.name: sawsi.shared.aws_es_proxy_util.install_go_mac
documentation:
Install Go programming language on macOS using Homebrew.
Go is required to install aws-es-proxy.

functions.name: sawsi.shared.aws_es_proxy_util.install_go_linux
documentation:
Install Go programming language on Linux using apt package manager.
Go is required to install aws-es-proxy.

functions.name: sawsi.shared.aws_es_proxy_util.install_go_windows
documentation:
Install Go programming language on Windows.
This function downloads the Go installer and runs it.
Go is required to install aws-es-proxy.

functions.name: sawsi.shared.aws_es_proxy_util.set_environment_variable_mac_linux
documentation:
Set the environment variables for Go and aws-es-proxy on macOS and Linux.
This function updates the PATH environment variable to include the Go bin directory.

functions.name: sawsi.shared.aws_es_proxy_util.set_environment_variable_windows
documentation:
Set the environment variables for Go and aws-es-proxy on Windows.
This function updates the PATH environment variable to include the Go bin directory.

functions.name: sawsi.shared.aws_es_proxy_util.install_aws_es_proxy_command
documentation:
Install aws-es-proxy using Go's package management.
This command works for both macOS and Linux.

functions.name: sawsi.shared.aws_es_proxy_util.install_aws_es_proxy_command_windows
documentation: Install aws-es-proxy on Windows using Go's package management.

  GSI의 읽기 용량 단위 (선택 사항, 프로비저닝 용량 모드일 경우).

  param write_capacity_units

functions.name: make.copy_without_overwrite
documentation:
shutil.copy와 유사하게 파일을 복사하지만, 대상 파일이 이미 존재하는 경우 복사를 수행하지 않습니다.

```
param source

복사할 소스 파일의 경로입니다.

param destination

파일을 복사할 대상 경로입니다. 파일 이름을 포함할 수도 있고, 디렉토리만을 지정할 수도 있습니다.

return

복사가 성공적으로 수행되었으면 True를, 이미 파일이 존재하여 복사하지 않았으면 False를 반환합니다.
```

methods.name: sawsi.model.base.DynamoModel.generate
documentation:
Query and get all items by generator
\:param pk_field: Field name to query (EX: 'user_id')
\:param pk_value: Field value to query (EX: 'uui21-sqtx54-er2367-jsk36s')
\:param sk_condition: Sort key condition Literal["eq", "lte", "lt", "gte", "gt", "btw", "stw"]
\:param sk_field: Sort key field name to query (EX: 'crt')
\:param sk_value: Sort key field value to query with sk_condition (EX: 1645437454) [Non-required]
\:param sk_second_value: If you want to use sk_condition "btw" (between), You can query like "sk_value \<= sk_field \<= sk_second_value" [Non-required]
\:param start_key:
\:param reverse:
\:param limit:
\:param consistent_read:
\:param filter_expression: Exp instance EX:
You can "from sawsi.model.base import Exp" and, Use
Exp(field='name', value='kim', condition='eq').or\_(

> Exp(field='name', value='lee', condition='eq')

)
\:return:
